title: taraxacum phymatocarpum
intro: Taraxacum phymatocarpum, also known as the Chinese dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum phymatocarpum include its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of the plant include reducing blood pressure, improving liver function, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum phymatocarpum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
